hero.subtitle: A radio station from Zurich's Seefeld district

home.intro: Radio Riesbach was a free radio station from Zurich's Seefeld district, which went on air in the 1980s. This exhibition invites you to explore the station's history through original recordings, photographs and eyewitness accounts.

about.heading: About Radio Riesbach
about.body: Radio Riesbach was a free radio station from the Seefeld district in Zurich. It broadcast from [year] to [year] and was part of the emerging free radio movement in Switzerland. The station was known for its local reports, music programmes and political discussions.

map.heading: Map of Seefeld
map.intro: Click on a dot to listen to the associated audio clip.
